name: Chicken and Stuffing Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat to 400°. Prepare stuffing mix according to package directions, but add vegetables with seasoning packet. Combine soup, milk, and parsley; set aside.
2. In a 2- or 3-quart shallow baking dish, arrange stuffing across center of dish. Spoon layer of the soup on each side of stuffing. Arrange chicken over soup mixture; overlap if necessary. Sprinkle with paprika.
3. Pour remaining soup over chicken. Cover and bake for 15 minutes. Uncover; bake for 10 more minutes until chicken is fork-tender. Stir sauce before serving.
